name: Berry Dutch Baby
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend together the egg whites, eggs, flour, milk, sugar, vanilla, and salt until smooth.
2. Melt butter in a 10- to 12-inch nonstick ovenproof frying pan in a 425 degree oven. Tilt the pan to coat it evenly.
3. Pour the batter into the pan and bake until puffy and well-browned (about 25 minutes).
4. In a bowl, combine the berries and cinnamon. Spoon the mixture onto the Dutch baby and sprinkle with powdered sugar.
